title: Halloween falling leaves
description: This Halloween mod adds leaves, pumpkins, and cobwebs to the main menu and player inventory, which fall gracefully and can be moved with the cursor.
body: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FM2DPZ7Enwo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>A Halloween-themed mod. It adds beautiful falling leaves, pumpkins, and spider webs to the main menu. They are also visible in the player's inventory during gameplay. They move around the cursor, making them more dynamic.
